# unifi_site (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi site by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the default site
data "unifi_site" "default" {
  name = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the site. Specify either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the site (matches internal name or description). Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The human-readable description of the site.
